name: UNITED SECURITY BANCSHARES
summary: United Security Bancshares (UBFO) is a bank holding company operating through its subsidiary United Security Bank. The company provides commercial and industrial loans, real estate mortgage loans (commercial, residential, home equity), construction loans, agricultural loans, consumer loans, and government program loans. It also offers commitments to extend credit and standby letters of credit, serving businesses and individuals primarily in its regional market area.
